title: Advanced Cohesive Devices
description: Sophisticated connectors: notwithstanding, insofar as, given that, albeit, thereby.
summary_pt_br: Conectivos sofisticados: notwithstanding, insofar as, given that, albeit, thereby.

scenes.subtitle_en: Sophisticated connectors: notwithstanding, insofar as, given that, albeit, thereby.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Conectivos sofisticados: notwithstanding, insofar as, given that, albeit, thereby.

scenes.text_en: Sophisticated connectors: notwithstanding, insofar as, given that, albeit, thereby. Focus: advanced cohesive devices. Notwithstanding the delays, the project succeeded.
scenes.text_pt: Conectivos sofisticados: notwithstanding, insofar as, given that, albeit, thereby. Foco: advanced cohesive devices. A despeito dos atrasos, o projeto foi bem-sucedido.

scenes.title: Advanced Cohesive Devices
scenes.body_en: NOTWITHSTANDING + noun (despite). INSOFAR AS + clause (to the extent that). GIVEN THAT (since). ALBEIT (although, especially mid-sentence). THEREBY (in doing so).
scenes.body_pt: Conectivos sofisticados: notwithstanding, insofar as, given that, albeit, thereby.

examples.en: Notwithstanding the delays, the project succeeded.
examples.pt: A despeito dos atrasos, o projeto foi bem-sucedido.

examples.en: Given that budgets are tight, we must prioritize.
examples.pt: Dado que os orçamentos são apertados, precisamos priorizar.

examples.en: Her speech was brilliant, albeit somewhat long.
examples.pt: O discurso dela foi brilhante, embora um tanto longo.

exercise.question: Complete: "___ the delays, the project succeeded."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Notwithstanding the delays, the project succeeded."
exercise.hint_pt_br: A despeito dos atrasos, o projeto foi bem-sucedido.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Given that budgets are tight, we must prioritize.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Given that budgets are tight, we must prioritize."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Dado que os orçamentos são apertados, precisamos priorizar.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Advanced Cohesive Devices — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre advanced cohesive devices. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Replace 'although' with 'albeit' in your own sentence.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: His argument was convincing, albeit dated.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Notwithstanding the rain, the rally continued.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Given that Q3 is approaching, we must decide.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Use 'thereby' to link cause to effect.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We reduced overhead, thereby lifting margins.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Insofar as resources allow, we'll expand.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: These connectors turn prose into argumentation.

scenes.title: The strategy memo
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize the memo using at least three advanced connectors.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: On Monday morning, Kumar reviewed a strategy memo written by a former student turned executive.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Notwithstanding the budget constraints outlined earlier, the proposal remains both ambitious and realistic.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: Given that our market share has plateaued, a bold pivot is exactly what the quarter requires.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Insofar as the data supports it, I would recommend approving the first phase without further delay.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: We reduced redundant reporting by thirty percent, thereby freeing our analysts for deeper work.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Cohesive devices at C1, Kumar believed, are the invisible architecture that holds serious writing upright.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Advanced Cohesive Devices". Sophisticated connectors: notwithstanding, insofar as, given that, albeit, thereby. Notwithstanding the delays, the project succeeded. Given that budgets are tight, we must prioritize. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Advanced Cohesive Devices". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Advanced Cohesive Devices".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Advanced Cohesive Devices".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
